ocr_text.text: WARNING: This product contains nicotine. Nicotine is highly addictive.
Only to be used by adults who are trying to quit smoking.
AVERTISSEMENT : Ce produit contient de la nicotine.
La nicotine crée une forte dépendance. À utiliser uniquement par des adultes
no more than 15 pouches a day.
This product may not be right for you. Always read and follow the label.
Ce produit peut ne pas vous convenir. Toujours lire l'étiquette et suivre le mode d'emploi.

step_2_brand_detection_pass1.overall_description: The image shows a close-up of hands holding an open ZONNIC tin with nicotine pouches. The ZONNIC logo is clearly visible on the tin lid, featuring a navy blue text and a green circular halo behind the C. Regulatory warnings and instructions are present above and below the main photo, with a clear 18+ icon and bilingual risk communication.

step_2b_formatted_detection_sent_to_pass:
OVERVIEW: The image shows a close-up of hands holding an open ZONNIC tin with nicotine pouches. The ZONNIC logo is clearly visible on the tin lid, featuring a navy blue text and a green circular halo behind the C. Regulatory warnings and instructions are present above and below the main photo, with a clear 18+ icon and bilingual risk communication.
CONTENT TYPE: flavour_led

── LOGO ──
  Present: YES
  Position: center-right (on product tin lid, visible in lower center of image)
  Text colour: navy blue
  Distorted or modified: NO
  Clear space sufficient: YES
  Relative size: medium (logo occupies about 20% of the visible tin lid, tin lid occupies about 10% of the full image)

── C HALO (CRITICAL) ──
  Any halo present: YES
  Halo on Z (leftmost letter): NO (correct)
  Halo on C (rightmost letter): YES (correct)
  Halo on other letters: none
  Halo colour: green (matches Green/Mint palette, appears solid)
  Halo is gradient (two colours): NO — solid single colour
  Gradient colours: green
  Shape: circle
  Proportional: YES
  Has outline: YES
  Outline colour: navy blue

── BACKGROUND ──
  Type: light_image
  Colours: white, grey, green, navy blue, skin tones
  Description: Photograph of hands holding an open ZONNIC tin with white nicotine pouches, product lid visible, background is out-of-focus indoor environment.

── REGULATORY ELEMENTS ──
  Nicotine warning: PRESENT
    Position: top (white panel above main image)
    Text: WARNING: This product contains nicotine. Nicotine is highly addictive. Only to be used by adults who are trying to quit smoking. AVERTISSEMENT : Ce produit contient de la nicotine. La nicotine crée une forte dépendance. À utiliser uniquement par des adultes qui désirent cesser de fumer.
    Bilingual: YES
  18+ age icon: PRESENT
    Position: bottom left
  Risk communication: PRESENT
    Position: bottom (white text on black bar)

── TYPOGRAPHY ──
  Fonts: bold sans-serif (logo), regular sans-serif (regulatory and instructional text)
  Sans-serif: YES
  Additional text: When to use
Repeat whenever a craving returns, no more than 15 pouches a day.

── COLOURS ──
  Dominant: white, navy blue, green, grey
  Flavour palette match: Green/Mint
  Secondary colour usage: secondary green used as accent (halo and tin rim), navy blue dominant in logo

step_3_rule_evaluation_pass2.summary: The image shows a close-up of hands holding an open ZONNIC tin with nicotine pouches. The ZONNIC logo is clearly visible on the tin lid, featuring navy blue text and a green circular halo behind the C, which matches the Green/Mint flavour palette. Regulatory warnings are present at the top (bilingual nicotine warning) and bottom (risk communication and 18+ icon), both in the correct positions. The logo is not distorted and has sufficient clear space, and the font used is a bold sans-serif consistent with brand standards. However, the halo around the C is a solid green colour with a navy blue outline, rather than the required gradient for light image backgrounds, and the outline on the halo is not permitted by brand guidelines. These are minor visual issues, but the image otherwise follows most brand standards correctly and regulatory requirements are fully met.

checks_performed.detail: Bilingual nicotine warning statement is present at the top of the image in both English and French.
18+ age restriction icon is present at the bottom left of the image.
Risk communication text is present at the bottom of the image in both English and French.
ZONNIC logo is clearly visible on the product tin lid.
Logo text is navy blue, which is correct for the light image background.
Halo around the C is a solid green colour with a navy blue outline, not a gradient as required for light image backgrounds, and the outline is not permitted.
Logo is not distorted, modified, or rearranged. No gradients in text, no outlines on logo text, and no stacking.
Background is a light image, which is appropriate for flavour-led content.
No full gradient background is used; image background is a photograph.
Content is flavour-led and uses a light image background, which is permitted.
All colours used are from the approved Green/Mint flavour palette and brand colours.
Font used is bold sans-serif for logo and regular sans-serif for regulatory and instructional text, consistent with Santral.
No grey gradient background is used in this image.
Logo has sufficient clear space around it.
Halo does not blend into the background, flavour matches, and logo is not placed in any shape or container.

violations.rule_text: On light image backgrounds, the C halo must always use the full gradient (primary + secondary colours).
violations.issue: The halo around the C is a solid green colour, not a gradient as required for light image backgrounds.
violations.fix_suggestion: Update the C halo to use a gradient of both primary and secondary Green/Mint colours.
violations.evidence: Halo is solid green on the tin lid, not a gradient.

violations.rule_text: Don't add an outline over a coloured halo.
violations.issue: The halo around the C has a visible navy blue outline, which is not permitted.
violations.fix_suggestion: Remove the outline from the C halo so it is only a coloured ring.
violations.evidence: Halo has a navy blue outline around the green ring.

violations.rule_text: Secondary/accent colours must not be used as the dominant background colour.
violations.issue: A secondary/accent colour is being used as the main background colour instead of as a small accent.
violations.fix_suggestion: Use the secondary colour only for small accents (halo, icons). Use white, navy, or a brand gradient as the background.
violations.evidence: Brand detection found secondary colour usage: 'secondary green used as accent (halo and tin rim), navy blue dominant in logo'.
